data.answer: The correct Leverage Ratio is 3.606x, calculated as Consolidated Total Debt of 3,480 divided by Adjusted EBITDA of 965.0 [DIGEST]. This is compliant with the §6.6A threshold of 3.75x [7].

raw: {"answer": "The correct Leverage Ratio is 3.606x, calculated as Consolidated Total Debt of 3,480 divided by Adjusted EBITDA of 965.0 [DIGEST]. This is compliant with the §6.6A threshold of 3.75x [7]."}
